scripts.build: npm run db:migrate && npm run generate -w @cash-cow/database && npm run build -w @cash-cow/database && npm run build -w @cash-cow/api && npm run sync:users-sheet
scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then dotenv -e .env -- npm run migrate -w @cash-cow/database; else npm run migrate -w @cash-cow/database; fi'
